profile.name: Weijian Shi
profile.title: Fudan University · Undergraduate, Class of 2029
profile.subtitle: Aircraft Design and Engineering · Information and Computational Science
bio: Hi! I'm Weijian Shi (石伟建), an undergraduate student at Fudan University, studying in the Academy of Intelligent Robotics and Advanced Manufacturing Innovation, Department of Aerospace Engineering.

I am pursuing a dual-degree path across Aircraft Design and Engineering and Information and Computational Science. My current interests sit at the intersection of aerospace systems, artificial intelligence, and scientific computing.
This homepage is designed as a living notebook: a place to collect projects, research notes, milestones, and the questions I am learning to ask better.

research.title: Aerospace Engineering
research.desc: Learning flight mechanics, aircraft design fundamentals, and the systems view behind modern aerospace engineering.

research.title: Artificial Intelligence
research.desc: Exploring how data-driven methods, learning algorithms, and control can support intelligent engineering systems.

research.title: Computational Science
research.desc: Practicing numerical methods, optimization, modeling, and scientific programming as tools for rigorous problem solving.

awards.title: AI Hackathon Tour 2026 · Fudan University Station — 6th Place & Finalist
awards.detail: Team Yuanlü (缘旅) · Project: Yuanlü / Wanderlace. Advanced to the national final in Nanjing after placing 6th at the Fudan University station; the project received positive feedback and recognition during the final showcase.
